hook.text: CASEMIRO FAREWELL FILM DROPS THIS WEEK

beats.text: MUTV RELEASING A SPECIAL FAREWELL FILM THIS WEEK
CASEMIRO WON THE CARABAO CUP WITH UNITED IN 2023
HE CAME FROM REAL MADRID AS A CHAMPIONS LEAGUE LEGEND

caption: Casemiro gave everything for Manchester United — and now the club is marking his legacy with a special farewell film on MUTV, dropping this week 🔴 The Brazilian midfielder arrived from Real Madrid in August 2022 as a five-time Champions League winner and helped United win the Carabao Cup in 2023. Whatever you thought of how his time ended, there's no denying what he gave us. What's your favourite Casemiro memory at Old Trafford? 👇 #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #casemiro
